description:
This is something from one of my games. I knew that if white lived in the corner I had lost or would have an extremly hard time making up for it so I looked for weaknesses.
I have only been playing for about a month and a half or so and white for a little less so if you see any alternatives please comment on them so I can check them out.  I tried to put as many as possible.
Thanks to MrMoto, BartTM
